name: Ron Davis
transactions: January 7, 1976:Drafted by theChicago Cubsin the3rd roundof the 1976 amateur draft (January).

June 12, 1978:theChicago CubssentRon Davisto theNew York Yankeesto complete an earlier deal made on June 10, 1978.June 10, 1978: TheChicago Cubssent a player to be named later to theNew York YankeesforKen Holtzman.
April 10, 1982:Traded by theNew York YankeeswithPaul BorisandGreg Gagneto theMinnesota TwinsforRoy Smalley.
August 13, 1986:Traded by theMinnesota TwinswithDewayne Coleman(minors) to theChicago CubsforJulius McDougal(minors),Ray FontenotandGeorge Frazier.
August 13, 1987:Signed as a Free Agent with theLos Angeles Dodgers.
May 11, 1988:Signed as a Free Agent with theSan Francisco Giants.
